Who we are

A company built on closeness and rigour

Seven Services exists to simplify life for those who live, work and invest in Portugal. We combine technical rigour with a human, multilingual service.

Our mission

To simplify life for those who live, work and invest in Portugal — with technical rigour, transparency and a genuinely human service.

Our culture

Closeness

Local teams that understand each client’s reality.

Rigour

Processes done right, from first contact to completion.

Multilingual

We serve in Portuguese, English and Spanish.

SANTOS JESUS Unipessoal Lda · NIPC 518 146 529

Team

Administrative, legal, tax and immigration advisory in Portugal.
